raw_description: Willey bowls a good length delivery outside off, Sharma drives it to deep point for a single.
Willey bowls full outside off, Pant swings hard but misses.
Willey bowls a good length delivery outside off, Pant tries to drive but misses.
Willey bowls outside off, Pant leaves it alone.
Willey bowls on middle, Pant defends it towards cover for a quick single.
Willey bowls outside off, Sharma defends it to the off side.
Topley bowls short of a length on leg stump, Pant tries to pull but gets an inside edge to the keeper.
Topley bowls outside off, Kohli defends it solidly to cover.
Topley bowls on middle, Kohli flicks it to square leg for a single.
Topley bowls outside off, Sharma tries to drive but gets an inside edge onto his pads.
Topley bowls outside off, Sharma mistimes a drive off the splice of the bat towards point.
Topley bowls on middle, Sharma flicks it towards mid-wicket.
Willey bowls a good length delivery outside off, Kohli defends it on the front foot to cover.
Willey bowls full on middle, Kohli flicks it beautifully over mid-on for a boundary.
Willey bowls full on middle again, Kohli flicks it elegantly over mid-on for a six.
Kohli backs away to a short of length delivery outside off, slashes hard but edges it to point where Roy takes the catch.
Willey bowls on the pads, Yadav flicks it to fine leg for a single.
Willey bowls a slower delivery outside off, Sharma defends it solidly on the front foot.
Gleeson bowls a good length delivery outside off, Yadav defends it off the back foot to point.
Gleeson bowls on middle and leg, Yadav flicks it to square leg for a single.
Gleeson bowls outside off, Sharma opens the face of the bat and guides it to third man for a single.
Gleeson bowls a quick delivery outside off, Yadav defends it solidly off the back foot.
Gleeson bowls outside off, Yadav defends it off the back foot to point.
Gleeson overpitches outside off, Yadav leans into a beautiful cover drive for a boundary.
Topley bowls full outside off, Rohit lofts it cleanly over extra cover for a boundary.
Topley bowls short of a length outside off, Rohit dabs it to short third man for a quick single.
Topley bowls full outside off, SA Yadav drives it to point for a single.
Topley bowls full outside off, Rohit slices a one-handed drive past point for four.
Topley bowls a slower ball short of a length, Rohit attempts a pull but misses completely.
Topley bowls an off-cutter, Rohit tries to pull but gets a top edge that is caught by Salt.
Gleeson bowls a good length delivery outside off, SA Yadav defends it to point.
Gleeson bowls a good length delivery outside off, SA Yadav defends it to cover.
Gleeson bowls a good length delivery outside off, SA Yadav defends it to point.
Gleeson bowls on the pads, SA Yadav misses the flick and it hits the pad for a leg bye.
Gleeson bowls a good length delivery on middle, Iyer pushes it down to mid-on for a quick single.
Gleeson bowls outside off, Yadav drives it towards cover for a single to end the over.
Willey bowls full and wide outside off, Yadav lofts it beautifully over the cover region for a boundary.
Willey bowls full on middle and leg, Yadav picks it up and flicks it elegantly over deep square leg for a six.
Willey bowls a slower good length ball, Yadav gets down on one knee and sweeps it towards deep square leg for a single.
Willey bowls short of a length outside off, Iyer cuts it off the back foot to deep point for a single.
Willey bowls a slower full ball outside off, Yadav drives it firmly to deep cover for a single.
Willey bowls another slower full ball outside off, Iyer drives it nicely through the cover region and they run two.
Jordan bowls a slower good length delivery outside off, Yadav drives it towards deep cover for a single.
Jordan bowls a slower good length ball outside off, Iyer defends it off the back foot towards point.
Jordan bowls short of a length outside off, Iyer cuts it to third man for a single.
Jordan bowls a good length delivery outside off, Yadav lofts it cleanly over extra cover for a boundary.
Jordan bowls a slower full delivery on middle, Yadav drives it in the air towards long on for a single.
Jordan bowls a good length delivery on middle, Iyer drives it firmly to mid on for no run.
Livingstone bowls a short delivery outside off, Yadav cuts it powerfully behind square for a boundary.
Livingstone bowls a short delivery on the leg stump, Yadav pulls it to short fine leg for no run.
Livingstone bowls a short delivery down the leg side, Yadav pulls it fine for a boundary.
Livingstone bowls a full delivery on middle stump, Yadav slog sweeps it over mid wicket for a boundary.
Livingstone bowls a good length delivery outside off, Yadav attempts to cut but misses.
Livingstone bowls a full delivery on middle, Yadav drives it down the ground to long on for a couple of runs.
Moeen Ali bowls full on middle, Iyer flicks it away to deep mid-wicket for a couple of runs.
Moeen Ali tosses it up outside off, Iyer goes for a big drive but misses it completely.
A high full toss on middle and leg, Iyer swats it away over deep square leg for a massive six.
Tossed up outside off, Iyer drives it firmly but straight to the fielder at cover.
Full delivery on middle, Iyer drives it down to long-on for a single.
Full on middle, Yadav drives it down to long-on for a single to end the over.
Jordan bowls back of a length on middle, Yadav pulls it away to deep square leg for a single.
Short of a length outside off, Iyer cuts it away to deep third man for a single.
Full delivery on middle, Yadav flicks it away nicely to deep mid-wicket for a couple of runs.
Good length outside off, Yadav drives it firmly but straight to the fielder at cover.
Full and wide outside off, Yadav slices it extravagantly over point for a boundary.
Yorker length outside off, Yadav squeezes it out towards cover for a single.
Topley bowls full outside off, Yadav drives it firmly to deep cover for a single.
Topley bowls short of a length on middle, Iyer pulls it away to deep square leg for a single.
Topley bowls full outside off, Yadav drives it to deep cover for another single.
Topley bowls a good length on middle, Iyer flicks it straight to the fielder at mid-wicket.
Topley bowls short and wide outside off, Iyer cuts it towards point where the fielder makes a diving stop, but they scramble a single.
Topley bowls full outside off, Yadav drives it to deep cover for a single to end the over.
Livingstone bowls full on the pads, Yadav gets down on one knee and sweeps it brilliantly over fine leg for a six.
Livingstone bowls full on middle, Yadav sweeps it along the ground to deep square leg for a single.
Livingstone tosses it up, Iyer steps down the track and lofts it cleanly straight down the ground for a massive six.
Livingstone bowls full outside off, Iyer attempts a reverse sweep but completely misses the ball.
Free hit delivery, Livingstone bowls full on middle, Yadav clears his front leg and lofts it cleanly over deep midwicket into the stands for six.
Livingstone bowls full outside off, turning away. Yadav attempts a sweep but misses. The keeper whips the bails off and appeals for a stumping, but the batsman's foot is grounded.
Gleeson bowls a full delivery outside off, Iyer drives it towards point where a misfield allows a single.
Gleeson bowls back of a length outside off, Yadav opens the bat face and plays an extraordinary upper cut over short third man for a six.
Gleeson bowls a full delivery wide outside off, Yadav reaches out and drives it to deep point for a single.
Gleeson bowls full outside off, Iyer drives it towards point for a quick single.
Gleeson bowls a slower full delivery on the pads, Yadav uses his wrists to flick it fine past short fine leg for a boundary.
Gleeson bowls full on middle, Yadav flicks it towards deep midwicket and they run hard to complete a double.

Delivery not shown in the broadcast video.
Delivery not shown in the broadcast video.
Delivery not shown in the broadcast video.
Delivery not shown in the broadcast video.
Topley bowls a short of length delivery outside off, Iyer backs away and tries to steer it late to third man but gets an outside edge to the keeper.
Full delivery angled across outside off, Karthik goes for a booming drive and misses completely.
Another full ball angled across outside off, Karthik tries to drive again and is beaten on the outside edge.
Topley bowls it very wide outside off, Karthik watches it go by and leaves it alone.
Full delivery outside off, Karthik drives it towards point and scampers for a quick single.
Full and wide outside off, Suryakumar Yadav slices a drive over backward point for a boundary.
Willey pitches it up outside off, Karthik drills it straight down the ground past mid-off for four.
Short of a length on middle and leg, Karthik pulls it away to deep square leg for a single.
Full and wide outside off, Suryakumar Yadav squeezes a drive past point for a boundary to bring up his century.
Willey bowls full outside off, Yadav lofts it down the ground towards long-on but mistimes it for a single.
Willey bowls a full delivery angling into the pads, Karthik misses the flick and is struck on the pad. Given not out initially but overturned to out LBW on review.
Willey bowls full outside off, Jadeja drags a mistimed drive across the line towards long-on for a single.
Gleeson bowls a sharp yorker outside off, Jadeja manages to dig it out back down the pitch.
Gleeson bowls a full toss, Jadeja swings hard and lofts it cleanly straight down the ground for a massive six.
Gleeson bowls a full, straight delivery, Jadeja misses his shot and is struck on the pad. Given out LBW and confirmed on review.
Gleeson bowls a wide yorker outside off. Patel tries to squeeze it out with a drive but misses completely.
Gleeson bowls a full delivery outside off. Patel drives it down the ground to long off for a single.
Gleeson bowls a wide full delivery. Yadav reaches out and squeezes a drive to the cover region for a quick single.
Moeen Ali bowls full and wide outside off. Yadav lofts it beautifully over extra cover for a boundary.
Moeen Ali bowls full outside off. Yadav opens the face of the bat and slices it brilliantly over deep cover for a six.
Moeen Ali bowls full and wide again. Yadav slices it aerially over backward point for another boundary.
Moeen Ali bowls a quicker full delivery outside off. Yadav attempts a reverse sweep but fails to make contact.
Yadav tries to loft Moeen Ali straight down the ground but mistimes it, and is caught by Salt diving forward at long off.
Delivery not shown in the broadcast clip.
CJ Jordan bowls a full delivery outside off, Avesh Khan swings hard across the line and mistimes it towards deep mid-wicket for a single.
Jordan bowls a full delivery outside off, Harshal Patel attempts a big heave but misses the ball completely.
Jordan bowls another full delivery wide outside off, Harshal Patel swings hard again but fails to make contact.
Jordan bowls full outside off, Harshal Patel tries to loft it but slices it high in the air towards point, where Gleeson takes a comfortable catch.
Jordan bowls full outside off, Ravi Bishnoi slices it over point, the fielder dives to save the boundary, resulting in two runs.
Jordan bowls an in-swinging yorker on middle stump, Ravi Bishnoi tries to dig it out but misses, and the ball crashes into the stumps.
